jobs.title: Build Simple 360° Virtual House Tour
jobs.description:
I already have a full set of high-resolution, professionally edited 360° photos for one property. What I now need is a seamless virtual tour assembled and published on a reliable hosting platform. I am platform-agnostic at this point—Kuula, Panoee, or any alternative you recommend that lets me share the tour by link and iframe embed will work, provided it keeps loading times fast and image quality intact.

jobs.title: Automated WooCommerce content pipeline
jobs.description:
I need a single, case specific pipeline that can:

• Enter a specified supplier site with Playwright, collect every product description, all associated pictures, and any linked PDF datasheets.  
• Pass the raw copy through a rewriting step so the final text follows our own standards—different voice, structure, and formatting from the source while preserving all technical details.  
• Push the cleaned assets into our WooCommerce store as new products (or update existing ones), mapping categories, attributes, images, and PDFs automatically.

The crawler must respect pagination, handle dynamic co

jobs.title: WordPress Speed & Database Optimization
jobs.description:
My WordPress site is online and functional, yet it drags under traffic spikes and scores poorly on GTmetrix and Google PageSpeed Insights. I need a focused performance overhaul that starts with the database. Slow queries, bloated tables, and missing indexes are the biggest pain-points, so the first milestone is a concise audit with Query Monitor or a comparable profiler, followed by concrete fixes inside phpMyAdmin (or CLI) to trim, index, and optimize every table.

Once the database is lean, I want the overall loading speed tightened up. That will likely involve configuring or replacing the c

jobs.title: Animated Full-Stack School Management System
jobs.description:
I need a full-stack web application that lets me run every aspect of our school’s fee and expenditure workflow from one browser window. The interface should feel modern, with smooth, unobtrusive animations that make daily use pleasant rather than flashy. Data integrity matters, so please wire everything to a solid SQL database.

Core flow I want to accomplish  
• Secure admin dashboard where I log in and create new student records for classes Pre-Primary through X, capturing name, parents’ names, date of birth, Aadhaar, phone and address.  
• Fee master where I define or later adjust admission

jobs.title: Enterprise Portal Development with Liferay DXP
jobs.description:
Project Title:
Liferay DXP Developer Needed for Enterprise Portal Development

Project Description:
We are looking for an experienced Liferay DXP Developer to help build, customize, and integrate enterprise-scale portal solutions.

The developer should have hands-on experience with Liferay DXP 7.4.x+, Java/J2EE, Spring Boot, Hibernate, REST/SOAP APIs, and front-end technologies like HTML, CSS, JavaScript, Angular or React.

Responsibilities:
- Develop and customize Liferay themes, layouts, portlets, modules, and portal components.
- Integrate Liferay with external systems using REST/SOAP APIs.
